_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to use and/or integrate a Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) platform.
reference_document_element_description: Implement platform monitoring and alerting for availability, performance, cost, and security events, with defined escalation procedures.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.493), DA-K-004 (DA, cosine: 0.472).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.574). Shared vocabulary: [platform, security]. DCWF-only terms [ability, event, information, integrate, management, siem] vs WIDAI-only terms [alerting, availability, cost, defined, escalation, events] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.866, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Ability to use and/or integrate a Security Information and Event Management (SIE" and "Implement platform monitoring and alerting for availability, performance, cost," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.552 ≈ STS 0.574 (gap 0.022). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [platform, security] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [platform, security]. DCWF-only: [ability, event, information, integrate, management, siem]. WIDAI-only: [alerting, availability, cost, defined, escalation, events].
